{{Quote|Vengeance! Vengeance for genocide!|[[Drend Navett]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
'''Vengeance''' was the code name used by a strike team of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] operatives working for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the [[Caamas Document]] crisis of [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. During that crisis, they operated as though they were an anti-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] terrorist group within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], angered by the refusal of the Bothans to admit collective responsibility and pay the penalty for their part in the destruction of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]].

The Vengeance cell, led by [[Drend Navett]], committed several acts of sabotage and instigated riots on several planets. Among them was a riot on [[Dordolum]] where they used a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]]-made grenade [[Occupation of Myomar|captured]] from a [[Myomaran]] resistance cell in order to make the Bith appear to have joined the anti-Bothan faction. Another operation took place on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] itself, where they used a [[Nightstinger sporting blaster rifle|Xerrol Nightstinger]] to make it appear that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and Bothan dignitary [[Rayl'skar]] had fired on a crowd of civilians [[Combined Clans Center Building riot|rioting]] outside the [[Combined Clans Center Building]].

Their final mission involved the sabotage of Bothawui's [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] generators in the planetary capital, [[Drev'starn]]. Vengeance managed to carry out this mission, despite the interference of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], and [[Moranda Savich]]. Navett was killed carrying out his mission on Bothawui, while the other members of his team—[[Klif]], [[Pensin]], and [[Horvic]]—infiltrated the [[Ishori]] cruiser ''[[Predominance]]''. Once the shields were down, the three remaining agents seized control of a weapons turret and began the bombardment of Drev'starn, setting off the [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Bothawui]].
